zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche於1440年1月1日出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，他的父親Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke21歲，母親Ann Morton20歲。他於1461年與Joan Oldham在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1519年在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche于1440年1月1日出生在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾时，他的父亲Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke21岁，母亲Ann Morton20岁。他于1461年与Joan Oldham在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1519年在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Beswicke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and East Yorkshire named Beswick. The second element is Old English wīc ‘outlying (dairy) farm’ (see Wick ). The first element of the Lancashire name may be an Old English personal name Bēac; that of the Yorkshire name is possibly an Old Norse personal name Bōsi or Besi.

variants.name: Wick
meanings: English: from Middle English wik(e) (Old English wīc) ‘building; enclosed piece of land; dependent farm where a certain kind of work is done’. In placenames the term is frequently combined with words associated with food production, as in Butterwick ‘butter wick’, Chiswick ‘cheese wick’, Cowick ‘cow wick’, Hardwick ‘herd wick’, Gatwick ‘goat wick’, Shapwick ‘sheep wick’, Goswick ‘goose wick’, Berwick ‘barley wick’, Fishwick ‘fish wick’. The most common sense is ‘dairy farm’. The surname may be topographic or occupational, denoting someone who lived or worked at a wick (compare Wicker ), or habitational, denoting someone who lived at or came from a place called Wick (of which there are examples in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Wiltshire, and Worcestershire), Wyke (Devon, Dorset, Surrey, Yorkshire), or Week (Cornwall, Devon, Hampshire, Isle of Wight, Somerset).
German: from a medieval personal name Wicko, a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with the element wīg ‘battle, war’.
German: habitational name from Wick (Westphalia) or any of the places called Wieck or Wiek.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche was born on 1 January 1440, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, his father, Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke, was 21 and his mother, Ann Morton, was 20. He married Joan Oldham in 1461, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1519, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche est né le 1 janvier 1440, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ann Morton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Oldham en 1461, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1519, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche am 1. Januar 1440 in Kendal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke 21 und seine Mutter Ann Morton 20. Er hat 1461 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Joan Oldham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1519 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Manchester, Lancashire, England und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche è nato il il 1 gennaio 1440 nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ann Morton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Oldham nel 1461, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1519, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Becheが1440年1月1日にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父Knight de la Beche Richard Beswickeは21歳，母Ann Mortonは20歳であった。1461年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドでJoan Oldhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1519年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche(이)가 1440년 1월 1일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Morton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 Joan Oldham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1519년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1440, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ann Morton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Oldham em 1461, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1519, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche родился 1 января 1440 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Morton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Oldham в 1461 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1519 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche nació el 1 de enero de 1440, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Knight de la Beche Richard Beswicke, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ann Morton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan Oldham en 1461, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1519, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
